MINI MINUTES: Norman Macleod appearing for and with Rachel Russell. Dennis Vann and Amy Harrington appearing for Linda Harrington. John Hurabiell appearing for and with Ruth Russell. Off Calendar Mar-24-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: John Hurabiell appearing for and with Ruth Russell. Dennis Vann appearing for petitioner. Norman Macleod appearing for Rachel Russel. Mrs. Russel is a joint tenant on the safe deposit box. She wants to be presented when the box is drill. Court has no problem of her being there. Issue on ownership of the contents addressed. Ms. Harrington will inventory the contents of the box and she will have contents of the box. Mr. Vann to prepare an order. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
